paragraphs.text: there is some good idea with the DFA, but i see a lot of potential for more security problems too. First to log here i needed to recreat an account or something, as to use French authentification i would have needed to use a smartphone and install more app, and do a maybe long processe to get said ID validat at a city hall. that aside the growing NEED to own a smartphone to do more and more administrative task is dangerous, both in accessibility, but in protecting user too. I fear protecting minor will be used as an excuse for more control too, nobody want to identify to go on adult website in the first place, so adult could mostly use VPN or more shady website that put they data at risk. same goes for minor, they will do what they can to get around those verification, and that could lead them to be exposed to even worst content or in extreme case fall prey to people "granting" them acces. there is already and for years the possibility of parental control over what rhey can acces on the family internet and now they phones. That is parenting job in the first place. also even before pornography minor are exposed to manipulatif game content using psychologie used in gambling, and beside a few country nothing as been done in that regard. lastly as it was been proven time and time again, the more step to add the more risk of something break or less security you have, recently Discord got hacked and people using identification got they data stolen ( including picture of driving licences etc). corporation can't be trhusted on they user data security, they will mostly use a third party to do the job and that will be one more thing that can and will go wrong, and again it lock OUT people who doesn t have or want smartphone, webcam and scanner. And when counrty urge people to use less energy and the growing energy crisis that is counter intuitive in the first place. yes the "i m 18+" isn t really enough by itself, but if parent don t want to use the tools they have to restrict acces to those site in the first place, there is little those adult site can realistic do too. in summary : it feel like an excuse for more control ( or a bad implementation that is wide open for abuse of control), that could put people to go on less secure website ( and so will minor too), were allowing to sell game for child with gambling inside and way to spend real money ( and putting family in debt in some case). the more control step the more risk someone could put a program between to stole data, it also make people put more sensitive data on the internet were there is no perfect security. i don't thurst a website saying they will delete the picture of our ID card after checking as there is no way to verify that in the first place, and that still a risk it could be stolen
